[0m[2m• [0mI’d think of [0m[1mEve as the agent shell[0m and [0m[1mEffect TS as the reliability/runtime layer inside every tool[0m.

  Eve is built around markdown instructions/skills plus TypeScript tools, with durable workflows, channels, subagents, schedules, sandboxes,
  connections, and evals built in. That maps well to Maky’s current pattern: AI products, cloud systems, integrations, MVPs, dashboards, and
  workflow automation. Your portfolio already has Drezzi, Cima, Starlit, Samaniego Cargo, and contractor sites, so the best bets are agents
  that turn those apps into ongoing services instead of one-shot web apps. Sources: Eve overview says “Markdown for instructions and skills,
  TypeScript for tools” and durable by default; tools are plain TypeScript files; Eve supports channels, connections, schedules, subagents,
  sandboxes, and evals. (eve.dev ([0m[4m[38;5;6mhttps://eve.dev/[0m)) (eve.dev ([0m[4m[38;5;6mhttps://eve.dev/[0m)) (eve.dev ([0m[4m[38;5;6mhttps://eve.dev/[0m)) Maky positions itself around
  AI development, cloud/systems, integrations, MVPs/tools, and these exact project categories. (makyinc.com ([0m[4m[38;5;6mhttps://makyinc.com/[0m))

  [0m[1mStrongest Ideas[0m

  [0m[38;5;12m1. [0m[1mMaky Ops Agent[0m
     Internal agent that watches all client projects: uptime, failed jobs, Stripe issues, AI costs, new contact forms, support requests, and
     deployment status. Ship it first because it directly improves your studio operations.

  [0m[38;5;12m2. [0m[1mClient Handoff Agent[0m
     For every delivered site/app, generate a private client agent that knows the project docs, deployment, admin tasks, common support
     answers, and how to request changes.

  [0m[38;5;12m3. [0m[1mAI Cost Governor[0m
     Especially for Drezzi, Cima, and Starlit. Agent checks model spend, image/video queue latency, failed generations, refund requests,
     abuse patterns, and daily gross margin.

  [0m[38;5;12m4. [0m[1mDrezzi Style Concierge[0m
     Drezzi is virtual try-on with body profiles, garment catalog, lookbooks, and style tips. Build an Eve agent that chats through outfit
     goals, finds garments, runs try-ons, explains results, and upsells credit packs. (getdrezzi.app ([0m[4m[38;5;6mhttps://getdrezzi.app/[0m))

  [0m[38;5;12m5. [0m[1mDrezzi Merchant Agent[0m
     Let small clothing shops upload product photos. Agent cleans metadata, writes product descriptions, creates try-on prompts, detects poor
     garment images, and generates Shopify/WooCommerce-ready listings.

  [0m[38;5;12m6. [0m[1mDrezzi Lookbook Scheduler[0m
     A scheduled agent creates weekly outfit boards from saved looks, season/weather, events, and new catalog drops.

  [0m[38;5;12m7. [0m[1mCima Personal Coach Agent[0m
     Cima already analyzes climbing videos with technique, efficiency, power, and confidence scores. Agent turns reports into training plans,
     weekly drills, injury-aware progression, and “next session” goals. (getcima.app ([0m[4m[38;5;6mhttps://getcima.app/[0m))

  [0m[38;5;12m8. [0m[1mCima Gym Partner Agent[0m
     For climbing gyms: ingest route-setting calendars, wall maps, member sessions, and anonymized performance. Agent suggests events,
     challenges, grade distribution tweaks, and retention campaigns.

  [0m[38;5;12m9. [0m[1mCima Challenge Referee[0m
     Agent validates challenge progress, checks logged sessions, summarizes leaderboard movement, and posts weekly challenge recaps to
     Discord/Slack.

  [0m[38;5;12m10. [0m[1mStarlit Creative Director[0m
     Starlit is an AI image generator with community/gallery/credits. Build an agent that helps users iterate prompts, produce
     brand-consistent batches, tag images, curate galleries, and flag low-quality outputs. (starlit-ai.com ([0m[4m[38;5;6mhttps://starlit-ai.com/[0m))

  [0m[38;5;12m11. [0m[1mStarlit Marketplace Agent[0m
     Agent packages generated images into sellable bundles: thumbnails, SEO titles, license notes, mockups, and social posts.

  [0m[38;5;12m12. [0m[1mSamaniego Shipment Support Agent[0m
     Samaniego has tracking, courier/package transport, global shipping, contact info, and bilingual content. Build a WhatsApp/web agent that
     tracks packages, answers customs/tax questions, collects quote details, and escalates edge cases. (samaniegocargoexpress.com
     ([0m[4m[38;5;6mhttps://samaniegocargoexpress.com/[0m))

  [0m[38;5;12m13. [0m[1mSamaniego Back Office Agent[0m
     Reads shipment orders, flags missing documentation, drafts customer updates in English/Spanish, and summarizes daily processing
     exceptions.

  [0m[38;5;12m14. [0m[1mSamaniego Import Advisor[0m
     Customer asks: “Can I ship this from Amazon to Ecuador?” Agent estimates requirements, prohibited items, taxes, package handling, and
     gives a step-by-step plan.

  [0m[38;5;12m15. [0m[1mContractor Lead Qualification Agent[0m
     For Mapogo and Gold Key: chat/phone-form agent that qualifies remodel/deck/basement/kitchen leads, asks for photos, estimates
     urgency/budget/location, and books callbacks. Mapogo emphasizes free estimates, Long Island service area, custom
     decks/basements/kitchen-bath remodeling. (mapogobros.com ([0m[4m[38;5;6mhttps://www.mapogobros.com/en[0m)) Gold Key covers remodeling, construction,
     repair, design, installation. (goldkeyhomeimprovement.com ([0m[4m[38;5;6mhttps://www.goldkeyhomeimprovement.com/[0m))

  [0m[38;5;12m16. [0m[1mContractor Estimate Prep Agent[0m
     Customer uploads photos/videos. Agent extracts scope, room dimensions if visible, issue type, likely materials, and generates a
     contractor-ready estimate packet.

  [0m[38;5;12m17. [0m[1mBilingual Contractor Content Agent[0m
     Automatically turns project photos into before/after posts, service pages, Google Business updates, Spanish/English captions, and
     testimonial requests.

  [0m[38;5;12m18. [0m[1mReview & Reputation Agent[0m
     For all contractor/logistics clients: agent detects completed jobs, sends review requests, drafts replies, and turns good reviews into
     site content.

  [0m[38;5;12m19. [0m[1mMaky Sales Engineer Agent[0m
     Public-facing makyinc.com agent that scopes leads, recommends MVP architecture, estimates rough budget/timeline, and creates a proposal
     draft.

  [0m[38;5;12m20. [0m[1mMaky Portfolio Case Study Agent[0m
     Agent periodically turns shipped features, metrics, screenshots, and client notes into polished case studies for your site.

  [0m[38;5;12m21. [0m[1mAI QA Agent For Generated Media[0m
     Shared service for Drezzi/Starlit/Cima: evaluates image/video outputs for artifacts, policy risk, prompt mismatch, identity issues, and
     rerun recommendations.

  [0m[38;5;12m22. [0m[1mAgentic Admin Dashboard Builder[0m
     Productize your internal dashboard work: connect Stripe/Auth/DB, let the agent generate CRUD screens, analytics cards, CSV exports, and
     admin workflows.

  [0m[38;5;12m23. [0m[1mScheduled Client Digest Agent[0m
     Every Monday, each client gets: traffic, leads, revenue, AI spend, errors, top user actions, and suggested improvements.

  [0m[38;5;12m24. [0m[1mMulti-Agent Launch Checklist[0m
     Subagents for SEO, accessibility, copy, analytics, auth/security, Stripe, mobile, performance. Run evals before shipping every client
     project.

  [0m[1mWhere Effect TS Fits[0m

  Use Effect inside Eve tools, not as a replacement for Eve. Eve gives you agent structure, channels, schedules, and deployment. Effect gives
  you typed, composable business logic. In current Effect 4 beta source, [0m[38;5;6mEffect[0m models lazy workflows with success/error/service
  requirements; [0m[38;5;6mServiceMap[0m handles dependency injection; [0m[38;5;6mLayer[0m builds and wires services; [0m[38;5;6mSchema[0m validates/decodes/encodes boundary data.
  (raw.githubusercontent.com ([0m[4m[38;5;6mhttps://raw.githubusercontent.com/Effect-TS/effect-smol/main/packages/effect/src/Effect.ts[0m))
  (raw.githubusercontent.com ([0m[4m[38;5;6mhttps://raw.githubusercontent.com/Effect-TS/effect-smol/main/packages/effect/src/ServiceMap.ts[0m))
  (raw.githubusercontent.com ([0m[4m[38;5;6mhttps://raw.githubusercontent.com/Effect-TS/effect-smol/main/packages/effect/src/Layer.ts[0m))
  (raw.githubusercontent.com ([0m[4m[38;5;6mhttps://raw.githubusercontent.com/Effect-TS/effect-smol/main/packages/effect/src/Schema.ts[0m))

  Best pattern:

  - Eve [0m[38;5;6minstructions.md[0m: agent behavior.
  - Eve [0m[38;5;6mskills/[0m: domain playbooks, like “quote a remodel,” “triage shipment issue,” “review AI try-on output.”
  - Eve [0m[38;5;6mtools/*.ts[0m: thin wrappers that call Effect programs.
  - Effect [0m[38;5;6mSchema[0m: validate tool input/output and external API responses.
  - Effect [0m[38;5;6mLayer[0m: wire DB, Stripe, OpenAI/Gemini, storage, email, WhatsApp, analytics.
  - Effect typed errors: distinguish [0m[38;5;6mPaymentFailed[0m, [0m[38;5;6mModelTimeout[0m, [0m[38;5;6mInvalidShipmentNumber[0m, [0m[38;5;6mUnsafeImage[0m, [0m[38;5;6mMissingLeadInfo[0m.
  - Effect retries/concurrency: batch reports, rerun failed generations, process video/image queues safely.

  My top 3 to actually build first: [0m[1mMaky Ops Agent[0m, [0m[1mSamaniego WhatsApp Shipment Agent[0m, and [0m[1mContractor Lead Qualification Agent[0m. They are
  practical, reusable across clients, and show off Eve’s durable scheduled/channel-based agent model without depending on speculative AI
  features.
